title: Phaeocephalum filifolium
taxonomy: Phaeocephalum filifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is commonly found in various parts of the world and belongs to the order Lamiales. It is a member of the genus Phaeocephalum, which is part of the kingdom Plantae. Phaeocephalum filifolium's classification is further divided into its full taxonomic hierarchy, including its family, genus, species, and other ranks. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
